description:
Parse and evaluate Elixir's with:

  with {:ok, a} <- foo(),
       {:ok, b} <- bar(a) do
    {:ok, b}
  end

Each binding pattern <- expr; if a binding fails, the with returns the non-matching value (or runs an else clause). Critical for ergonomic ok/err tuple handling, which is fz's chosen error model.
title: Implement the with form
